createView.title: Create New Wallet
createView.subtitle: Write down your recovery phrase and store it safely.
createView.confirmPhrase: I have written down my recovery phrase and stored it in a safe place.
createView.passwordNote: Your wallet is encrypted on this device with this password. There is no way to recover it if you forget it — keep your recovery phrase safe as a backup.

importView.title: Import Wallet
importView.subtitle: Enter your 12 or 24 word recovery phrase to restore your wallet.
importView.placeholder: Enter your recovery phrase, separating each word with a space...
importView.passwordNote: Your wallet is encrypted on this device with this password.

settingsModal.title: Settings
settingsModal.subtitle: Security and wallet controls.
settingsModal.autoLockEnabled: Lock the wallet automatically when idle. Activity resets the timer.
settingsModal.autoLockDisabled: Set a password to enable auto-lock.
settingsModal.enableLockingTitle: Set a password to enable locking
settingsModal.enableLockingLink: Set a password to enable locking

dashboard.enableLockingTitle: Set a password to enable locking
dashboard.protectedBody: Your seed, contacts, and claim links are encrypted on this device.
dashboard.unprotectedBody: Set a password to encrypt your wallet and enable claim links.

resetModal.title: Reset Wallet
resetModal.body: This will remove your wallet from this device. Make sure you have your recovery phrase saved before continuing.

unlockView.title: Unlock Wallet
unlockView.subtitle: Enter your password to access your wallet.
